_comment_oauth: oauthClientId/oauthClientSecret/userTokenPath are optional and must be set together (or all left empty, as below, to disable). They enable inviting attendees on a personal (non-Workspace) calendar, where the service account above can never do it without domain-wide delegation — see DelegatedAuth. Client id/secret come from a Google Cloud 'TV and Limited Input' OAuth client, not the service account. Example if enabled: oauthClientId/oauthClientSecret from that client, userTokenPath e.g. /etc/kiosk/google-user-token.json.
